examples: Unscanned, unsearched, my satchel could easily have held the odd grenade or an anthrax-stuffed lunchbox.
He buckled his satchel on to his bicycle.
She carried a filled canvas satchel.
Google search terms so people searching for bags would be directed to Cambridge Satchel.
The satchel has since been in the pages of popular magazines Elle, GQ and Cosmopolitan.
